response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience that align with the role’s technical demands, but his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of executive-level leadership, architectural oversight of client projects, or direct team management experience beyond individual contributor roles.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with GISCollective and multiple DLang/Node.js libraries
Extensive full-stack experience across Linux, TypeScript, Docker, and cloud-native architectures
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and community engagement
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
Lack of clear evidence of client-facing architecture advisory or project leadership at executive level
No explicit experience with UML modeling, requirements management, or IT compliance/risk frameworks
